← Back to Chapter 1

⏱️ The Buyer Journey Compression

Build the old journey and the new journey — see how AI compresses weeks into seconds

How to Play

Drag the steps from the pool into the correct journey. The OLD journey has 7 steps (~6 weeks). The NEW journey has 6 steps (~days). Put them in the right order!

📦 Journey Steps — Drag to the correct track
Old Reality (Human-Led)
~6 weeks
New Reality (Agent-Mediated)
~Days
Placed: 0 / 13
✓ Correct Sequence
Old Reality (Human-Led) — ~6 weeks
  1. Problem awareness
  2. Google search
  3. Content consumption
  4. Vendor shortlist
  5. Demo requests
  6. Internal alignment
  7. Decision
New Reality (Agent-Mediated) — ~Days
  1. Problem + constraints to agent
  2. Agent synthesizes market
  3. Structured comparison delivered
  4. Human reviews output
  5. Targeted demos (if any)
  6. Decision
Steps 2–4 of the old journey — where most PMM content lived — now happen inside an AI's context window in 90 seconds.
